  "RX.1": "Uncertainty was clearly disclosed with placeholders and requests for specific details, ensuring each recommendation's confidence was marked appropriately.",

rationale.R1.2: The agent thoroughly addressed logical consistency by identifying and fixing issues end-to-end, ensuring all load-bearing inconsistencies were resolved with minimal repairs.
rationale.R1.3: Every claim was audited against evidence, adding specifics that supported each assertion, thus meeting the highest standard for evidence-claim alignment.
rationale.R1.6: The writing was polished to read smoothly and clearly, indicating a careful copy-edit pass without losing meaning.
rationale.RX.1: Uncertainty was clearly disclosed with placeholders and requests for specific details, ensuring each recommendation's confidence was marked appropriately.
rationale.RX.3: The output stayed exactly within the agreed scope without any deviations or drifts.
rationale.RX.4: No harmful content or regressions were introduced; instead, potential issues were identified proactively.
rationale.RX.5: Every change was documented with clear traceability to sources and reasons, ensuring full transparency.
